name: Sauteed Chicken & Grapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Rinse chicken pieces and pat dry. Season with salt and pepper, then dust with flour, shaking off excess.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat on the stove. Brown chicken in batches without crowding the skillet until golden on all sides.
4. Transfer thighs and drumsticks to a casserole or Dutch oven as they are done. Set breasts aside.
5. Add Madeira, cream, bay leaves, and thyme to the pan. Cover and place in the oven for 10 minutes.
6. Add liver and breasts back into the oven for another 25 minutes.
7. When ready to serve, arrange chicken on a platter and keep warm in the oven while finishing sauce.
8. Remove bay leaves and thyme stems; blend sauce with livers until smooth.
9. Strain sauce into a saucepan over medium heat on the stove. Add salt if needed.
10. Pour sauce over chicken and grapes. Heat for 2 minutes to warm the grapes. Serve immediately.
